# D22 UPGD Prototype Hybrid OPMNIST

Protocol: 3 paired seed(s), 1000 online steps, final window 200, source `sklearn_digits_28x28`, 5 permutation tasks.

Standalone `proto_*` methods are the JAX fixed-budget D20 memory. `hybrid_*` methods update UPGD and memory every step and blend their predictions with a prediction-confidence gate.
